artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of a defeated goblin candidate standing alone atop an overturned crate in a riotous, burning town square at night, one fist half-raised in hollow gratitude toward a near-empty space, lit from below by leaping bonfire flame; confetti and embers drift through the smoke, an abandoned snack table glinting at the edge, flame orange against night-black haze, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Concession Speech
text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or a Voter.
Draw two cards, then create two Snack tokens. (A Snack is a red artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 1 life.")
flavorText: "I want to thank my supporters, both of them, and the snack table."
